market_summary: Global stock markets faced a downturn on March 20 due to geopolitical tensions (Iran-Israel conflict) driving energy prices up and Fed interest rate concerns. However, the Art Market shows signs of recovery (up 4% in 2025), particularly at the ultra-high end.
art_insights: The U.S. art market rebounded 23% in 2025. Focus remains on provenance and long-term significance over speculation.
key_events: Global Art Market value reached $59.6 billion in 2025
U.S. Art auction sales up 23% YoY
